name: Ananya Rao
quote: DK rebuilt our website from the ground up and the difference was night and day. The animations feel expensive without ever feeling slow.

name: Karthik Subramaniam
quote: Our Instagram posters finally look like they belong to a brand twice our size. Turnaround was fast and revisions were painless.

name: Priya Menon
quote: The learning platform DK built handles thousands of students without breaking a sweat. Communication throughout was excellent.

name: Rohan Das
quote: From concept to final cut, the video edits captured exactly the energy we wanted. Our shorts now consistently outperform past content.

name: Sneha Iyer
quote: Clean UI, thoughtful UX, and genuinely fast delivery. DK asked the right questions before writing a single line of code.
